extraction.one_line_summary: EVENEPOEL Remco attacked with under 30km to go on La Redoute, soloed to win by 48 seconds over the chase group.
tactical_patterns: EVENEPOEL's attack from La Redoute with 30km remaining succeeded despite climb historically only setting up finales, not winning moves.
Quick-Step rode defensively after EVENEPOEL's move; no chase organization from favorites allowed 48-second gap despite flat run-in.
VAN AERT contested sprint for second rather than bridging solo, revealing cost-benefit calculation against pursuing lone attackers.

rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: positive: delivered under massive pressure after pelvis fracture in 2020 Lombardia and subsequent criticism for lack of wins
rider_signals.VAN AERT Wout: neutral: strong enough for podium sprint but chose not to commit to solo bridge with 30km remaining
rider_signals.MATTHEWS Michael: negative: abandoned early despite strong AG2R squad supporting him as pre-race option
rider_signals.VALVERDE Alejandro: neutral: seventh place in final LBL appearance after four career wins shows declining but respectable form
rider_signals.HIGUITA Sergio: positive: finished in podium group despite team status suggesting strong individual climbing remains
